overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage showing first-person night driving through a rain-soaked neon-lit futuristic city. The player navigates from elevated highways through enclosed tunnels to industrial underpasses, encountering light traffic and dense cyberpunk urban architecture with heavy neon signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated multi-lane highway with neon signage

agents.ego_description: cruising at high speed on elevated highway through neon-lit cityscape with light rain

entered.detail: large illuminated commercial signs with cyberpunk aesthetic in various colors
yellow reflective safety barriers lining both sides of the elevated road
suspended linear lighting fixtures illuminating the highway from above

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with high-speed driving on an elevated multi-lane highway during a rainy night. Neon billboards and overhead lights illuminate the wet asphalt while the vehicle maintains highway speeds through the futuristic urban landscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban commercial street with dense advertising

events.description: vehicle decelerates significantly from highway speed to urban cruising speed approaching intersection

agents.ego_description: slowing down and navigating through denser urban streets with increasing traffic presence

notable_agents.action: red sedan ahead slowing down and stopping at traffic intersection

entered.detail: large digital advertising screens displaying animated cyberpunk commercials
tall futuristic structures with illuminated windows and architectural details

segments.scene_description: Transitioning from the open highway to denser urban streets, the vehicle slows down significantly. Large commercial billboards line the left side while other vehicles appear ahead, navigating the wet city streets under heavy neon illumination.

events.description: entering enclosed concrete tunnel with artificial lighting and no sky visibility
ambient lighting shifts from colorful neon glow to uniform greenish artificial tunnel lighting

agents.ego_description: maintaining steady speed through the long enclosed tunnel with concrete walls

entered.detail: rough textured concrete barriers with horizontal construction lines and occasional doors
recessed ceiling lights casting greenish artificial illumination throughout the tunnel

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a long enclosed concrete tunnel, transitioning from the vibrant neon city to a more utilitarian space with greenish artificial lighting. The concrete walls create a narrow corridor effect while the road continues straight ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated ramp transitioning from tunnel to surface

events.description: exiting tunnel back into open air with rain visible on windshield and neon lights returning

agents.ego_description: navigating curved ramp while exiting tunnel, returning to open air with rain effects

entered.detail: concrete barriers with integrated lighting along the curved exit ramp
returning colorful illuminated signs visible as the vehicle exits the tunnel

segments.scene_description: Exiting the tunnel via a curved ramp, the vehicle returns to open air where rain is visible again. The lighting transitions back to mixed neon and ambient city glow as the ramp curves toward lower street levels.

events.description: vehicle slows to crawl approaching checkpoint barrier in industrial zone
coming to complete stop at yellow and black striped security checkpoint barrier

agents.ego_description: driving through industrial underpass and coming to complete stop at security checkpoint barrier

notable_agents.action: yellow sports car ahead navigating through the checkpoint area

entered.detail: weathered concrete structures with industrial piping and minimal lighting
yellow and black striped security barrier blocking the road ahead
orange and white striped barriers lining the right side of the underpass

segments.scene_description: The final segment takes place in a dimly lit industrial underpass with concrete walls and construction barriers. The vehicle slows to a complete stop at a yellow and black striped security checkpoint barrier, ending the drive in the enclosed industrial zone.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person drive that transitions from a high-speed neon highway into a claustrophobic industrial underpass. It begins with a rapid descent along an elevated multi-lane highway, where rain-slicked asphalt reflects the glow of towering billboards and overhead lights. As the vehicle slows and merges into denser urban streets, the open vista narrows, eventually funneling the camera into a long concrete tunnel characterized by utilitarian greenish artificial lighting. The scene then shifts back to the open air via a curving ramp, where the rain returns and the lighting blends neon hues with ambient city glow. Finally, the camera glides into a dimly lit industrial zone, passing concrete walls and construction barriers before coming to a complete stop at a striped security checkpoint.
